# Polymarket — Data Agreement

## Provider
Polymarket, Inc.

## URL
https://polymarket.com/

## Terms of Service URL
https://polymarket.com/tos

## License
API ToS (proprietary)

## Data We Collect
Public prediction market data via the Polymarket API including market questions, outcomes, current prices/probabilities, volume, liquidity, and resolution status. Covers markets on politics, economics, science, crypto, and current events.

## How We Use It
Prediction market signal in DRM3 products. Polymarket data provides crowd-sourced probability estimates for future events, used as a forward-looking sentiment and prediction signal for data enrichment and analysis.

## Commercial Use
Yes, with conditions. Polymarket's public market data is accessible via their API. Display of market data in third-party applications is generally permitted. Polymarket is a public prediction market and visibility of their data serves their platform's interests.

## Redistribution
Limited. We may display Polymarket data (market questions, probabilities, volumes) as part of enriched data profiles. We should not build a product that replicates the Polymarket trading interface or serves as a substitute for their platform.

## Attribution Required
Recommended. Best practice: credit "Data from Polymarket" when displaying prediction market probabilities. Link back to the relevant market on polymarket.com where practical.

## Rate Limits
- API rate limits not extensively documented
- Reasonable use expected
- No API key required for public market data endpoints
- WebSocket feeds available for real-time updates

## Key Restrictions
- Do not use data to facilitate unlicensed gambling or prediction market activity
- Do not misrepresent Polymarket prices as certainties or guarantees
- Do not build a competing prediction market platform using their data
- Be aware of regulatory considerations: prediction markets have varying legal status by jurisdiction
- Do not represent Polymarket data as financial advice

## Last Reviewed
2026-04-02
